FROZENHAND-FROZEN_HAND_RELIC.title: Frozen Hand
FROZENHAND-FROZEN_HAND_RELIC.description: Your [gold]Hand[/gold], [gold]Draw[/gold], [gold]Discard[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] piles persist between combats. Their exact order is preserved.
FROZENHAND-FROZEN_HAND_RELIC.flavor: Nothing leaves your grasp. Not even the past.
